历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 5580→6737→17397 (abnormal gap in 2023)→7476→5939. Excluding the 2023 gap value, the trend from 2021 to 2025 shows a decline followed by an increase, with 2025 rising to 5939, moving up about 1537 places compared to 2024, and a cumulative increase of about 798 places over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 5939. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 34 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 31 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 30, a decrease of 1 from 2025 (a reduction of about 3.2%), slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the main campus's ranking of 22nd on the Soft Science Ranking (2026), placing it among the top universities nationwide, with sustained appeal to Jilin science students. The reputation of Shandong University (Weihai) is linked to the main campus, with a slightly negative reputation evaluation in 2026, but a high overall popularity on Douyin ranking 20th (high heat), indicating high attention on short video platforms. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps for this university in Jilin Province. Shandong University has strong disciplines including Mathematics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Physics A-, and outstanding electronic information-related disciplines. The Weihai campus offers majors such as Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Physics, with solid foundational disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category-related majors, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, Mathematics/Statistics are moderately recommended, and Marine Science has average popularity. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 79,970 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 72.1%, slightly lower than 2025 (80,421), easing competitive pressure slightly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5939, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-1), a slight decrease in total candidates, the top-tier school level, and high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will move up slightly compared to 2025 (slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5794, with a range of 5294–6294.
